case_title: AIDA MENJIVAR VS. RAYMOND JOHN RAYMOND

docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-1999 AT 01:35 AM IN DEPT 404
RESPONDANT'S NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO QUASH PETITIONERSREQUEST FOR MODIFICATIONS
COURT ORDERS RESP SHALL BE AVAILABLE BY NOON ON 9/23/99 AT PETN RESIDENCE TO REMOVE HIS PERSONAL BELONGINGS, BUT HE MUST NOT ENTER HER HOME. PETN WILL ADVANCE THE COST
OF THE MOVE BUT RESP SHALL REPAY HER BY 12/99 BY MONEY ORDER. AFTER RESP REMOVES HIS BELONINGS, HE IS TO RETURN THE APARTMENT KEY TO PETN IN AN
OF THE UNIT. COURT ORDERS RESP MUST NOT CONTACT PETN OR HER GRANDSON AND STAY 75 YARDS AWAY FROM PETN, HER RESIDENCE, HER GRANDSON AND HER WORK FOR
CONTINUED FR 9/21/99 TO (DEPT CORRECTION) PER E CROSS, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-1999 AT 01:35 PM IN DEPT 403
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE
THREE YEARS. RESP SHALL NOT BE ON THE SECOND FLOOR OF PETN APARTMENT BUILDING. R/O IS SIGNED. (404-SBK)  MARGARET DEL COTO CSR #8493D HER WORK FOR
